questions.question: Which restaurants in Chicago Il are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Restaurants in Chicago Il with weekend hours include: McDonald's (Sat: 05:00-21:00), Domino's (Sat: 10:00-01:00), Dunkin' (Sat: 05:00-17:00), Mancino's Pizza and Grinders (Sat: 11:00-22:00), Panda Express (Sat: 10:00-21:30), Subway (Sat: 08:00-20:30), Subway (Sat: 08:00-22:00), Subway (Sat: 09:00-21:00) and 1187 more. 1195 total with weekend availability.
